function.name: document_summarize
function.description: Summarize collected documents into per-document markdown summaries and generate batch summaries.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite existing document summaries and batch summaries.

doc_ids.description: Optional cycle-scoped document IDs to summarize. If provided, only these docs are summarized.

rebuild_batches.description: Whether to generate batch summaries after document summarization. If doc_ids are provided, only cycle-scoped batches are generated.
